# Host-side build tools for CI. cibuildwheel handles wheel repair internally
# (auditwheel on Linux, delocate on macOS, delvewheel on Windows) and runs the
# Rust DSO build inside its own container — setuptools-rust lives in build-cibw.txt
# for that container, not here on the host.
build==1.2.2.post1
setuptools-scm==8.1.0
cibuildwheel==2.23.3
